title: Flying Domestic in NZ with Kids — Air NZ Tips, Baggage, and Seat Selection
meta_desc: Flying domestic in NZ with kids? Get Air NZ tips, baggage allowance, and seat selection advice for a stress-free family flight
intro: Flying with kids can be daunting, especially on domestic routes. With Air NZ's varying baggage allowances and seat selection options, it's essential to plan ahead. A recent flight from Auckland to Queenstown with our family of four cost $1,200, highlighting the need for smart booking strategies.

sections.heading: Air NZ Domestic Routes and Prices
sections.body: Air NZ operates numerous domestic routes, including popular ones like Auckland to Queenstown, Christchurch, and Wellington. Prices vary depending on the route, time of year, and how far in advance you book. For example, a one-way economy ticket from Auckland to Queenstown can cost between $150-$300 per person.

sections.heading: Baggage Allowance and Fees
list: Air NZ's standard domestic baggage allowance is 1x 23kg checked bag per person
Additional checked bags cost $20-$30 per bag, depending on the route
Infants (0-23 months) have a 10kg baggage allowance, while children (2-11 years) have the same allowance as adults

sections.heading: Comparing Queenstown, Christchurch, and Wellington Routes
sections.body: When flying domestic with kids, it's essential to consider the airport facilities and activities available at your destination. Queenstown Airport has a dedicated family area with a play zone and nursing room, while Christchurch Airport offers a more extensive range of dining and shopping options. Wellington Airport, on the other hand, is smaller but more convenient for city-based activities.

sections.heading: Tips for Flying with Kids
list: Book seats together to ensure your family is seated as a unit
Consider booking a morning flight to avoid peak traffic and long queues
Pack entertainment and snacks to keep your kids occupied during the flight

sections.heading: Plan Your Family Trip with Our Tools

cta.text: Use our NZ Family Travel Budget Calculator to plan your next trip

sections.heading: Accommodation Options at Your Destination
sections.body: Once you've booked your flights, consider your accommodation options. For a family-friendly stay in Queenstown, try the Millennium Hotel Queenstown, which offers rooms from $250 per night. In Wellington, the Copthorne Hotel Wellington has rooms from $180 per night and is within walking distance to the city centre.
